name: Give and Take
name_jp: ギブ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>＆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アンド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>テイク
desc: Special Summon 1 monster from your Graveyard to your opponent's side of the field in Defense Position, and increase the Level of 1 monster you control by the Level of the Special Summoned monster, until the End Phase.
eff: Special Summon 1 monster from your Graveyard to your opponent's side of the field in Defense Position, and increase the Level of 1 monster you control by the Level of the Special Summoned monster, until the End Phase.

summoning: Special Summons from your Graveyard to your opponent's field
